chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 243 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.1141/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.08.2023 None present. No intimation is received. It appears that since filing of this petition on 13.02.2023, no one has appeared. We have seen the contents of petition and are of the tentative view that the petition is not maintainable even otherwise. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
